title: dracaena rubra
intro: Dracaena rubra, also known as the red dragon tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dracaena rubra include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Dracaena rubra include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
